description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a mix of modern and traditional architectural elements, featuring a prominent rectangular structure clad in light brown brick or stone. The house has a flat and slightly sloped roof, with a large arched window above the main entrance and several rectangular windows distributed across both floors. A black-roofed garage is attached to one side, with a driveway leading up to it and a white car parked outside. The front yard includes a paved patio area with outdoor furniture and a large tree providing shade, while the backyard is mostly open green lawn. The landscaping is minimal but includes a few trees and shrubs, and the property is bordered by a paved walkway and driveway.
description: A two-story suburban house with a flat and slightly sloped roof, brick exterior, attached garage, and landscaped front and back yards with patio and trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, arched window, patio with outdoor furniture, and a large tree in the front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the attached garage, driveway with a parked car, and additional trees and shrubs along the property edge.
description_view_2: Angled view displaying the garage, driveway, main entrance with arched window, and a mix of front and side landscaping.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the house, open green lawn, patio area, and minimal landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with a large arched window above the entry and rectangular windows distributed across both floors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a prominent arched window above the door, a paved patio, and no visible porch or columns.
